concept_hook: A Brazilian demoness who channels hellfire through seductive dance, burning opponents while enjoying their suffering
narrative_role: Pure sadist who revels in causing pain, the monster who makes other monsters uncomfortable
media_archetype_inspiration: Fire-themed succubus from Brazilian folklore meets Mortal Kombat's Skarlet

concept_hook: Nigerian viper who uses pharmaceutical knowledge to create custom poisons that torment victims slowly
narrative_role: Intellectual sadist who views fighting as chemistry experiment, finds brute force vulgar
media_archetype_inspiration: Walter White meets Black Widow, Nigerian biotech entrepreneur turned poison specialist

concept_hook: Australian huntress who survived the outback alone since 16, using traps and psychological warfare against anyone who enters her territory
narrative_role: Animalistic survivor who views all conflicts as prey vs predator, feral and unpredictable
media_archetype_inspiration: Yau Yau from Far Cry Primal meets Predator's hunting philosophy

concept_hook: Swedish doll who upgraded her body with cutting-edge android tech, becoming more machine than human but clinging to her humanity
narrative_role: The question of what makes someone human, fighting to prove she's more than her programming
media_archetype_inspiration: Motoko Kusanagi meets Swedish minimalism, cybernetic ballet dancer

concept_hook: French witch who weaponizes perfume and pheromones, each scent designed to manipulate emotions and cripple opponents
narrative_role: Aristocratic manipulator who fights like a chess game, always three moves ahead
media_archetype_inspiration: Perfume: The Story of a Murderer meets classic French fashion houses

concept_hook: Indian prodigy who mastered ancient martial arts through VR simulation, fighting like a ghost who can strike from any angle
narrative_role: The future of combat, learning and adapting in real-time, treats fighting like a video game
media_archetype_inspiration: Ready Player One's Parzival meets Bollywood action choreography

concept_hook: Mexican empress who rose from cartel territory through ruthless political manipulation, ruling her fight organization with iron elegance
narrative_role: Power broker who views the league as her kingdom, treats fighters like chess pieces
media_archetype_inspiration: Narcos meets The Crown's Elizabeth, cartel queen with aristocratic bearing

concept_hook: Japanese nymph who can manipulate plant life, turning any environment into her personal jungle battlefield
narrative_role: Nature's wrath meets cherry blossom beauty, fights to protect the last sacred forests
media_archetype_inspiration: Princess Mononoke meets Street Fighter's Cammy, ecological warrior
